title: Nobody Wanted to Die
actors: Kazimieras Vitkus, Regimantas Adomaitis, Bruno O'Ya
plot: 1947 year. Armed gangs are still hiding in Lithuanian forests. One after another, four village council chairmen were killed. Now old Lokis is dead. At the funeral, his four sons swear to destroy the Brownie gang. And Vaitkus, a fo...
